title: mentha longifolia var. incana
intro: Mentha longifolia var. incana, also known as woolly mint, is a variety of mint plant that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Mentha longifolia var. incana include relief from digestive problems, headaches, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
